task.label: Require verification of the identity of the customer and the beneficial owner

exception.description: May allow verification to be completed during the establishment of a business relationship
May allow the opening of an account before full compliance

task.label: Verify the identity of the customer and the beneficial owner

conditions.condition: Before the establishment of a business relationship or the carrying out of the transaction

exception.description: Verification may be completed during the establishment of a business relationship
An account may be opened before verification provided adequate safeguards are in place

task.label: Allow verification of identity to be completed during the establishment of a business relationship

conditions.condition: If necessary so as not to interrupt the normal conduct of business
Where there is little risk of money laundering or terrorist financing
If verification is allowed to be completed during the establishment of a business relationship
As soon as practicable after initial contact

task.label: Allow the opening of an account

conditions.condition: Provided that there are adequate safeguards in place to ensure that transactions are not carried out by the customer or on its behalf until full compliance with customer due diligence requirements is obtained
Until full compliance with the customer due diligence requirements laid down in points (a) and (b) of the first subparagraph of Article 13(1) is obtained

task.label: Require that an obliged entity does not carry out transactions, does not establish a business relationship, terminates the business relationship and considers making a suspicious transaction report

conditions.condition: Where an obliged entity is unable to comply with the customer due diligence requirements laid down in point (a), (b) or (c) of the first subparagraph of Article 13(1)

exception.description: Shall not apply to notaries, independent legal professionals, auditors, external accountants and tax advisors to the strict extent they ascertain legal position or represent a client in judicial proceedings

task.label: Carry out a transaction through a bank account

conditions.condition: Where unable to comply with the customer due diligence requirements laid down in point (a), (b) or (c) of the first subparagraph of Article 13(1)

exception.description: Prohibition does not apply to notaries, independent legal professionals, auditors, external accountants and tax advisors to the strict extent they ascertain the legal position of their client or perform the task of defending or representing that client

conditions.condition: Where unable to comply with the customer due diligence requirements laid down in point (a), (b) or (c) of the first subparagraph of Article 13(1)

exception.description: Prohibition does not apply to notaries, independent legal professionals, auditors, external accountants and tax advisors to the strict extent they ascertain the legal position of their client or perform the task of defending or representing that client

conditions.condition: Where unable to comply with the customer due diligence requirements laid down in point (a), (b) or (c) of the first subparagraph of Article 13(1)

exception.description: Prohibition does not apply to notaries, independent legal professionals, auditors, external accountants and tax advisors to the strict extent they ascertain the legal position of their client or perform the task of defending or representing that client

conditions.condition: Where unable to comply with the customer due diligence requirements laid down in point (a), (b) or (c) of the first subparagraph of Article 13(1)

exception.description: Obligation does not apply to notaries, independent legal professionals, auditors, external accountants and tax advisors to the strict extent they ascertain the legal position of their client or perform the task of defending or representing that client

task.label: Consider making a suspicious transaction report to the FIU in relation to the customer

conditions.condition: Where unable to comply with the customer due diligence requirements laid down in point (a), (b) or (c) of the first subparagraph of Article 13(1)

exception.description: Obligation does not apply to notaries, independent legal professionals, auditors, external accountants and tax advisors to the strict extent they ascertain the legal position of their client or perform the task of defending or representing that client

conditions.condition: To notaries, other independent legal professionals, auditors, external accountants and tax advisors
Only to the strict extent that those persons ascertain the legal position of their client, or perform the task of defending or representing that client in, or concerning, judicial proceedings

task.label: Require that obliged entities apply the customer due diligence measures to new and existing customers
Apply the customer due diligence measures

conditions.condition: At appropriate times to existing customers on a risk-sensitive basis, including at times when the relevant circumstances of a customer change
